text:
4. Limited contractual liability.
- vii. Contractor's  Equipment Insurance provided  on  an  'all  risk'  form, covering all risk of physical damage to equipment provided for use at the Project site by Contractor or any Subcontractor of any tier, whether owned, leased,  rented,  borrowed  or  used  at  the  Project  site.    Contractor  or  any Subcontractor of any tier waives its rights of recovery against Owner and each of its officers, employees, consultants and agents including, but not limited to, the Board and each Owner Representative, as to any damage or loss which may occur to its equipment to the extent covered by insurance. Contractor or any Subcontractor of any tier will ensure that the insurance company  providing  such  coverage  specifically  agrees  to  this  waiver.  If uninsured, Contractor or any Subcontractor of any tier will hold harmless the aforementioned parties for loss or damage to its tools and equipment.
